author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Practice Surge Before April 20

Hey everyone, Surge is now LIVE for testing on the Epic Games Store until !    

That means we won't have a Discord-only technical test this Saturday. Please take advantage of the next week to sharpen your skills and provide us with your feedback and bug reports! As a reminder, use ⁠No Access to ensure that we can track effectively track everything. 

Don't have a key but want to test? Feel free to request one in ⁠No Access
